---
title: "DESeq2_Fgsea_NSCLCORIEN"
author: "Dipankor Dhrubo"
date: "2025-09-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

library("tidyverse")
library(survival)
library(ggsurvfit)
library(survminer)
library(DESeq2)
library(viridis)
library(factoextra)
library(BiocManager)
library(ggrepel)
library(data.table)
library(msigdbr)
library(fgsea)
library(pheatmap)
library(UpSetR)
```

```{r}

## Loading the sample data
Lung_metadata<- readRDS("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/NSCLC_metadata.rds") %>% 
  select(sample, CAlevel) %>% unique()

```

```{r}

### Loading the expression files

## Directing path where the expression data is stored

cpath<- "/fs/ess/PAS1695/projects/exotho/data/All_Cancer_Gene_expression"

Sample.files <- list.files(cpath, pattern = "\\.genes\\.results$", full.names = T)
head(Sample.files)
  
expected_samples<- Lung_metadata$sample

expected_expressions<-file.path(cpath, paste0(expected_samples, ".genes.results"))

## To make sure we grab all the sample expression file location

table(expected_expressions %in% Sample.files)

valid_files <- expected_expressions[file.exists(expected_expressions)]
names(valid_files) <- expected_samples[file.exists(expected_expressions)]


########## Reading out expression data for selected cancers



cancer_list<- unique(Clinical_data$Cancer)
samples<- list()

for (cancer in cancer_list) {
  
  samples[[cancer]] <- Clinical_data %>% filter(Cancer == cancer) %>% pull(sample) %>%
    paste0(".genes.results")
  
  
}


######## Reading out count data for Lung cancer


Expression_mat_lung <- map(valid_files, ~{
  df <- read_tsv(.x, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  # Rename gene_id to gene_symbol if needed
  if ("gene_id" %in% colnames(df) && !"gene_symbol" %in% colnames(df)) {
    colnames(df)[colnames(df) == "gene_id"] <- "gene_symbol"
  }
  
  # Select only the needed columns
  df %>% select(gene_symbol, count = expected_count)
})



Expression_mat_lung <- map(Expression_mat_lung, ~ {
  .x %>%
    group_by(gene_symbol) %>%
    summarise(count = sum(count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
})



sample_names <- basename(valid_files) %>% sub("\\.genes\\.results$", "", .)

# Step 2: Assign sample names as column names before joining
Expression_mat_lung_named <- map2(
  Expression_mat_lung,
  sample_names,
  ~{
    colnames(.x)[2] <- .y  # Rename "count" to actual sample name
    .x
  }
)

lung_expression <- Expression_mat_lung_named[[1]]

for (i in 2:length(Expression_mat_lung_named)) {
  lung_expression <- left_join(lung_expression, Expression_mat_lung_named[[i]], by = "gene_symbol")
}

write_rds(lung_expression,"/fs/ess/PAS1695/projects/exotho/data/Digital_Twins/NSCLC_Gene_Expression_data.rds")

```

```{r}
#Loading the Lung gene expression data

lung_expression<- readRDS("/fs/ess/PAS1695/projects/exotho/data/Digital_Twins/NSCLC_Gene_Expression_data.rds")

### DEG Analysis between high vs low

### Starting with lung


Lung_metadata<- Lung_metadata %>% column_to_rownames("sample")

lung_expression<- lung_expression %>% column_to_rownames("gene_symbol")




##### need to process one file that has ENST as their gene name

SA<- read_tsv("/fs/ess/PAS1695/projects/exotho/data/All_Cancer_Gene_expression/FT-SA243679R.genes.results") %>% select(gene_id, expected_count)


Gene_symbols<- read_csv("/fs/ess/PAS1695/projects/exotho/data/microbiomeRIG/key_gene-id-to-symbol.csv")


SA<- SA %>% left_join(Gene_symbols, by= "gene_id") %>% 
  select(gene_symbol,SA243679R= expected_count)

colnames(SA)[2]<- "FT-SA243679R"

SA<- SA %>% group_by(gene_symbol) %>%
  summarise(count = sum(`FT-SA243679R`, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

lung_expression_2<- lung_expression %>% select(-`FT-SA243679R`)

lung_expression_2<- lung_expression_2 %>% left_join(SA,by="gene_symbol")

lung_expression_2<- lung_expression_2 %>% column_to_rownames("gene_symbol")
colnames(lung_expression_2)[1844] <- "FT-SA243679R"

### making Sure that column names in the expression file is in the same order as metadata sample column

lung_expression_2<- lung_expression_2 %>% select(rownames(Lung_metadata))

all(colnames(lung_expression_2) == rownames(Lung_metadata))
lung_expression_2<- round(lung_expression_2)

str(Lung_metadata)

#####

#Running DESeq2 analysis

dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = lung_expression_2,
                              colData = Lung_metadata,
                              design = ~ CAlevel)  # replace 'condition' with your metadata column

dds <- DESeq(dds)


## Extracting Deseq result
res <- results(dds)
res<- as.data.frame(res)

## Filtering out significantly dysregulated genes


res_sorted <- res[order(res$padj),]

res_sorted<- as.data.frame(res_sorted)

res_sorted$Expression<- "NO"
res_sorted$Expression[res_sorted$log2FoldChange >= 0.8 & res_sorted$padj < 0.05] <- "UP"
res_sorted$Expression[res_sorted$log2FoldChange <= -0.8 & res_sorted$padj < 0.05] <- "Down"

res_sorted <- tibble::rownames_to_column(res_sorted, var = "Gene")


### These codes are for labling purposes. You can ignore these
top_up <- res_sorted %>%
  filter(log2FoldChange > 0.8, padj < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  head(10)

top_down <- res_sorted %>%
  filter(log2FoldChange < -0.8, padj < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  head(10)

# Combine the top genera for labeling
top_genes <- rbind(top_up, top_down)

res_sorted$delabel <- ifelse(res_sorted$Gene %in% top_genes$Gene, as.character(res_sorted$Gene), NA)
Lung_cancer_DEG_result<- res_sorted

### Saving the Deseq2 result
write_rds(Lung_cancer_DEG_result,"/fs/ess/PAS1695/projects/exotho/data/Digital_Twins/DESeq_results_NSCLCORIEN2025_lowCAhighCA.rda")


# Volcano plot

p1<- ggplot(data = Lung_cancer_DEG_result, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), col = Expression, label = delabel)) +
  
  # Add vertical and horizontal threshold lines
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.8, 0.8), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') + 
  
  # Scatter plot of points with custom colors
  geom_point(size = 2) + 
  
  # Custom color scheme for differential expression categories
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#00AFBB", "grey", "#bb0c00"), 
                     labels = c("Downregulated", "Not significant", "Upregulated")) +
  
  # Limit the x and y axes to avoid infinite values
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 150), xlim = c(-6, 4)) + 
  
  # Add custom labels and title
  labs(color = 'Expression',
       x = expression("log"[2]*"FC"),
       y = expression("-log"[10]*"p-value"),
       title = "Lung_cancer: Volcano Expression Plot (Low Candida vs. High Candida)") +
  
  # Customize x-axis breaks
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 10, 2)) +
  
  # Add text labels using geom_text_repel to prevent overlap
  geom_text_repel(data = top_genes, aes(label = Gene), 
                  size = 3, max.overlaps = Inf, box.padding = 0.5, 
                  point.padding = 0.3, segment.size = 0.2, color = "black") +
  
  # Apply a clean theme
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold",size = 12),
        axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold",size = 14),
        axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold",size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold",size = 14)
        )



p1

ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/NSCLCORIEN_DEG_plot.png", width = 8, height = 6)

```



```{r}

## DGSEA analysis

## #This is prepping the pathways for running the pathway analysis. 

resPlot <- data.frame(res) %>% 
  arrange(pvalue)


msig.human <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens") %>% 
  dplyr::select(gs_collection, ncbi_gene, gs_name, gene_symbol, gs_description) %>%
  dplyr::rename("pathname" = gs_name, "Genes" = gene_symbol, "desc" = gs_description,
                "category" = gs_collection, "NCBI Entrez ID" = ncbi_gene)

msig.hlmrk <- msig.human %>%
  filter(category=="H") %>%
  unique()

hlmrk.paths <- msig.hlmrk %>%
  dplyr::select(Genes, pathname) %>%
  split(x = .$Genes, f = .$pathname)



# res: DESeq2 results with columns log2FoldChange, pvalue, padj, stat, rownames = gene IDs

# Pick STAT as ranking; map to SYMBOL (or keep ENSEMBL consistently with your pathways)


# 0) Pull rowData into a plain data.frame
rdf <- as.data.frame(rowData(dds))

# 1) Try to find a symbol-like column
candidate_cols <- c("SYMBOL","symbol","gene_name","external_gene_name","hgnc_symbol","GeneSymbol")
sym_col <- intersect(candidate_cols, colnames(rdf))
if (length(sym_col) > 0) {
  SYMBOL_vec <- rdf[[sym_col[1]]]
} else {
  SYMBOL_vec <- NULL
}

# 2) If still NULL, try to map ENSEMBL -> SYMBOL (optional; comment out if you don't want extra deps)
# remove version suffixes like ENSG00000141510.12
ens <- sub("\\.\\d+$", "", rownames(dds))
if (is.null(SYMBOL_vec)) {
  # Option A: org.Hs.eg.db (works offline once installed)
  # BiocManager::install("org.Hs.eg.db")
  # library(org.Hs.eg.db); library(AnnotationDbi)
  # SYMBOL_vec <- AnnotationDbi::mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db, keys = ens, keytype = "ENSEMBL", column = "SYMBOL", multiVals = "first")

  # Option B: if you skip mapping, fall back to ENSEMBL as "SYMBOL"
  SYMBOL_vec <- ens
}

# 3) Build res2 safely
res2 <- as.data.frame(res) %>%
  mutate(
    gene   = rownames(res),
    SYMBOL = SYMBOL_vec[match(gene, rownames(dds))]
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(stat), !is.na(SYMBOL)) %>%
  group_by(SYMBOL) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs(stat), n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

# 4) Ranking vector (named by SYMBOL to match hlmrk.paths)
sigrank <- res2$stat
names(sigrank) <- res2$SYMBOL
sigrank <- sort(sigrank, decreasing = TRUE)
set.seed(1); sigrank <- sigrank + rnorm(length(sigrank), sd = 1e-8)

# Tiny jitter just to break exact matches; won’t change biology


library(fgsea)

set.seed(123)
fg <- fgsea(
  pathways      = hlmrk.paths,
  stats         = sigrank,
  minSize       = 15,
  maxSize       = 500,
  nPermSimple   = 10000,   # bump this; 20000–50000 if warnings persist
  scoreType     = "std",   # try "pos"/"neg" if your ranks are strongly one-sided
  eps           = 1e-50
)

## Saving the fgsea data

write_rds(fg,"/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/FGSEA_NSCLCORIEN2025_lowCAhighCA.rda")

dds.fgsea.sig_NSCLC <- fg %>%
  filter(pval < 0.05) %>%
  select(pathway, pval, padj, NES) %>% 
  mutate(pathway = str_remove(pathway, "HALLMARK_"))

barord.dds <- arrange(dds.fgsea.sig_NSCLC, NES)


## Ploting the pathway

Fgsea_figure<- dds.fgsea.sig_NSCLC %>%
  mutate(pathway = fct_relevel(pathway, barord.dds$pathway)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = pathway, y = NES)) +
  geom_col(fill = "red") +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
    title = "GSEA: Pathways Enriched in High vs. Low Candida",
    subtitle = "Comparison by Candida Abundance Level"
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    text = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10)
  )


ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/FGSEA_NSCLCORIEN2025_lowCAhighCA.png",Fgsea_figure, width = 8, height = 4)


## Extracting Up regulated genes for Network analysis

Up_genes<- res_sorted %>% filter(Expression == "UP") %>% pull(Gene)

write_lines(
  Up_genes,
  "/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Upregulated_genes.txt"
)

```
